# nomad_node_pool (Resource)

Provisions a node pool within a Nomad cluster.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nomad_node_pool" "dev" {
  name        = "dev"
  description = "Nodes for the development environment."

  meta = {
    department = "Engineering"
    env        = "dev"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Unique name for this node pool.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description for this node pool.
- `meta` (Map of String) Metadata associated with the node pool
- `node_identity_ttl` (String) The TTL applied to node identities issued to nodes in this pool.
- `scheduler_config` (Block List, Max: 1) Scheduler configuration for the node pool. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--scheduler_config))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--scheduler_config"></a>
### Nested Schema for `scheduler_config`

Optional:

- `memory_oversubscription` (String) If true, the node pool will have memory oversubscription enabled.
- `scheduler_algorithm` (String) The scheduler algorithm to use in the node pool.
